platform_decisions.content: Windows PowerShell DevContainer automation with Podman/Docker backend selection
DevContainer standardizes IDE with ESLint, Prettier, GitLens extensions and formatOnSave
Command history and Claude config persisted across DevContainer restarts via Docker volumes
DevContainer granted NET_ADMIN/NET_RAW capabilities for iptables-based egress control
Node.js 20 LTS as DevContainer base image
Non-root user for DevContainer runtime; restricted privilege escalation for firewall script only
ZSH with Powerlevel10k theme and fzf in DevContainer for developer experience
Allowlist-based network egress control via iptables/ipset; default DROP policy
GitHub IP ranges fetched dynamically from API and aggregated for CIDR efficiency
Docker internal DNS rules preserved during firewall initialization
NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX for per-user global package installation without root
LF line endings globally enforced via gitattributes
